prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait of a young woman standing beside a large glass storefront at blue hour in a modern city. The glass creates subtle reflections and layered double-exposure effects, while distant traffic produces soft red and white light trails, colorful bokeh, and cinematic motion blur. She wears an oversized charcoal-black blazer over a fitted black top with light-wash high-waisted denim jeans, silver hoop earrings, and a loose effortless updo with wispy face-framing strands. Calm, confident expression, direct eye contact, natural makeup, relaxed pose with one hand in pocket. Reflections blend naturally across the glass without obscuring facial features. Soft on-camera flash freezes the subject while the city remains blurred from a slow shutter. Premium editorial fashion photography, Vogue campaign aesthetic, authentic urban atmosphere, natural skin texture, high dynamic range, realistic reflections, shallow depth of field, subtle chromatic aberration, dreamy glow, rich contrast, muted cool tones with warm neon accents, 85mm lens, f/1.8, 1/10s slow shutter, ISO 400, cinematic color grading, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, no CGI, no illustration, no text, no watermark.

promptZh: 超写实时尚大片人像，一位年轻女性站在现代城市 蓝调时刻 的大型玻璃店面旁。玻璃营造出微妙的反射和层叠的双重曝光效果，远处的车流形成柔和的红白光轨、绚丽的焦外成像以及电影般的动态模糊。她身着 炭黑色廓形西装外套，内搭修身黑色上衣，下穿浅色高腰牛仔裤，佩戴 银色圆环耳饰，发型为随性慵懒的盘发，脸颊两侧留有碎发。神情沉稳自信，直视镜头，妆容自然，姿态放松，单手插兜。反射自然地融合在玻璃上，且不遮挡面部特征。机顶闪光灯柔和地定格了主体，而城市背景因慢快门呈现出模糊感。顶级时尚摄影，Vogue 广告大片美学，真实的城市氛围，自然的皮肤纹理，高动态范围，逼真的反射，浅景深，细微的色差，梦幻光晕，丰富的对比度，冷色调背景点缀暖色霓虹，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，1/10s 慢快门，ISO 400，电影级调色，超精细，照片级真实，8K，无 CGI，无插画，无文字，无水印。
